dataList.name: Headsplitting Memory
dataList.desc: On Clash Lose, gain 1 [RegretSCorp] (once per turn)

dataList.name: Ch'unokkun
dataList.desc: If this unit inflicted [TiedRope] on target, gain [TiedWithRope]
dataList.flavor:
S Corp. commands two sorts of Taboo Hunters: The Royal Censors and the Ch'unokkuns.
Agents of the Royal Court, the Royal Censors generally operate alone, moving undercover to pursue those who have dared to break the Taboo of Salpippyeo.
Ch'unokkuns, much like Fixer Offices, form bands within their own ranks. Once an order or a contract to hunt down a Branded is bestowed upon them, each band hunts its mark in the manner preferred by the band. The hunt for Nobi knows neither honor nor dignity.

dataList.name: Scouring Hunterband [推刷巾]
dataList.desc: Deal +5% damage for every 1 [Binding] on target (max 15%)
dataList.flavor:
To cover the eyes is not to be blind.
These fabrics, created using Q Corp.'s Singularity, are fashioned into many forms, such as blindfolds and headbands, and are commonly used throughout the East. It is not unusual to see Fixers and employees of corporate entities in the East covering their heads and faces with these products.
The fabrics serve the same function as sunglasses, visors, and combat prosthetic eyes found elsewhere in the City. They scan the target's information in real time, augment the wearer's vision, and provide tactical analysis. At times, they can also serve as a means of communication with distant allies.

dataList.name: Tracking Traces
dataList.desc: On Clash Win, gain 2 [Breath] for every [ScratchesHurt] on target

dataList.name: Throwing the Ohra Bond
dataList.desc: On Hit, if target is Staggered, inflict 2 [Binding] next turn

dataList.name: Arranged Information
dataList.desc: If this unit inflicted [TakePicture] on an enemy, heal 10 SP

dataList.name: Firm Nailing
dataList.desc: On triggering [VibrationExplosion] on an enemy, raise target's Stagger Threshold by [LensmanNail] Stack

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Great Hwando
dataList.desc: Encounter Start: Gain 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Assume a different Battleform of the Homeland every 3 turns Turn End: If this unit has Shield, gain 5 [Breath] and +2 [Breath] Count next turn When the following conditions are met, use a pattern that includes the "Bow of the Homeland - Arrowloose" Skill - When this unit lost all Clashes for 2 turns in a row (does not check for Unopposed Attacks) - In the turn after the turn in which this unit spent in Stagger - When in Low Morale or Panic
dataList.flavor:
The Sword of the Homeland, S Corp.'s traditional art of swordsmanship, is also divided into three branches: Sal, Pi, and Ppyeo.
Within their teachings exist techniques to hew and cleave through creatures of colossal stature such as Sanguns.
To perform them in full, a swordsman must wield a great hwando capable of bearing the strain of the techniques.

dataList.name: Dujeong Brigandine [Sal] - Iron Bulwark
dataList.desc: Take -30% damage from [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], [Burst], [Sinking] (rounded down) Gain the effects of [PanicChangeLock]; If this unit is Panicked at Turn End, reset SP to 45 Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain 5 [ChoiSwordsmanshipShield] When [ChoiSwordsmanshipShield] expires, end Encounter
dataList.flavor:
The Eastern Warstride Armors are not so much "equipped" as they are "piloted." S Corp.'s Dujeong Brigandine is one example of such armor.
Much like R Corp.'s Powered Armor Suit and the Full Plate Armor used by the Knights of the West, the Dujeong Brigandine greatly augments the user's offensive and defensive combat capabilities.
Yet these advantages do not mean that Eastern Warstride Armors are readily supplied for combat personnel. Each unit has its own unique controls and comes with the limitation of requiring separate fuels.
What remains certain, however, is that, as with all the aforementioned armors, once a rider has familiarized himself with the Dujeong Brigandine's extended reach and heightened power output, he becomes a machine of war that strides across battlefields with the promise of slaughter.

dataList.name: Martial Arts of Perseverance
dataList.desc:
On Clash Win, gain +2 [Breath] Count (2 times per turn)

If the target this unit's Skill hit has less than 5 [Laceration] Potency, inflict 1 [Laceration] and +2 [Laceration] Count at Attack End (once per Skill, 2 times per turn, prioritize the main target)
dataList.flavor:
'There are those who persevere in training for lack of talent. Then there are those blessed with talent, only to let it rust.'
'All men say that the title of Apex Blade can be seized only by the gifted.'
'It matters not. Until the day comes for this blade of mine to rise high enough to meet the clouds, I shall persevere in honing my prowess.'

dataList.name: Yield My Flesh
dataList.desc: Deal and take +20% damage on Critical Hit against and from Bamboo-hatted Kim

dataList.name: Developed Memories
dataList.desc: Upon entering the Encounter, gain 3 [PhotoTransitionChoi] Turn Start: At 0 [PhotoTransitionChoi] Stack, Retreat and transition into a different location When Returning to the field, based on current Battleform of the Homeland, gain or lose [ChoiSwordsmanship] - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: Gain Stack - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: Lose Stack

dataList.name: Mismatched Memories
dataList.desc: Turn Start: Gain the following effects: - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: At less than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack, gain (5 - [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack) [Vulnerable] - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: At more than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack, gain [Vulnerable] equal to surplus [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack past 5

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Rend Flesh from Flesh
dataList.desc:
Encounter Start: Gain 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship]

Assume a different Battleform of the Homeland every 3 turns

On Hit using a Slash Skill, gain 1 [Breath] Potency (once per Skill)

When the following conditions are met, use a pattern that includes the "Bow of the Homeland - Arrowloose" Skill
- When this unit lost all Clashes for 2 turns in a row (does not check for Unopposed Attacks)
- Turn after Stagger
- When in Low Morale or Panic

Turn Start: At Min or Max [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stacks, use a powerful Skill
If this unit used the "Bow of the Homeland - Arrowloose" Skill in the last turn, use a powerful Skill regardless of [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack on self
At 55% or lower HP, use a powerful Skill regardless of [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack on self
dataList.flavor:
The Sword of the Homeland passed down in the Sal Court Circle is not, at its heart, an art of killing.
To cut and cut again until blood runs dry and the bone is laid bare—that is the essence of this art that strips the opponent's flesh into ribbons.
That is the Sword of the Homeland practiced by "Sal."

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Shift Battleform
dataList.desc: Turn Start: Gain or lose 2 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack based on Battleform of the Homeland on self (does not activate in the first turn of the Encounter) - [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: Gain Stack - [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: Lose Stack In the turn where this unit equipped Envy Skills, this unit will not be affected by [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack adjustment effects, and will reset [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack to 5 next turn

dataList.name: Dujeong Brigandine [Sal] - Great Mountain
dataList.desc: Take -30% damage from [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], [Burst], [Sinking] (rounded down) Gain the effects of [PanicChangeLock]; If this unit is Panicked at Turn End, reset SP to 45 Turn Start: Gain the following effects: - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: At less than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack, gain (5 - [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack) [Vulnerable] - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: At more than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack, gain [Vulnerable] equal to surplus [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack past 5
dataList.flavor:
The three Court Circles of Sal, Pi, and Ppyeo each remade the standard Dujeong Brigandine of S Corp. into forms suited to their own doctrines.
The olden tales say that the "Sal" has ever been the first to spearhead a slaughter, eager to cleave the enemy's flesh before any other.
The "Pi" harvests the blood that spills forth from each opened flesh wound and turns it into endurance on the battlefield.
The "Ppyeo" takes the close of a slaughter. They part one joint from the other, bringing the enemy to their knees. Then, a blade through the neckbone finishes the collective act of killing.

dataList.name: Scattering Memories
dataList.desc: On death, give +1 E.G.O resource of the least-owned Affinity

dataList.name: Location-type Distortion: Photo Lab
dataList.desc: This unit cannot be killed, and does not take any damage from sources other than Skill damage from Skills attacking this unit as the main target This unit's Speed is fixed to 1 Turn Start after entering the Encounter: Gain 3 [PhotoTransitionChoiCamera] Turn End: If [PhotoTransitionChoiCamera] reaches 0 Stack, or if this unit's HP reaches 1, activate the following at the next Turn Start: - Remove self and N Corp. Class 2 Staff from the Encounter - Return Im Gyeong-eop to the Encounter - Move the battle to a different location

dataList.name: From Memory to Record
dataList.desc: Combat Start: If the battlefield has returned from S Corp. to N Corp. this turn, heal 15 SP for all Sinners
